iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 00:00 — FALLING. Mojtaba Khamenei's first statement focuses entirely on conventional warfare: demands closure of US bases, vows continued attacks on Israel/Gulf. No nuclear rhetoric whatsoever. Hegseth says new SL 'wounded and likely disfigured.' Iran boasted pre-war that 460kg of 60% uranium could make 11 bombs (Witkoff testimony) — latent capability remains but no active enrichment escalation. Scientists killed + Isfahan buried degrades operational capability. Nuclear track continues de-escalation as conventional war consumes all attention. 13→10.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 00:00 — RISING/IMMINENT. MASSIVE escalation across Gulf: (1) Iranian drones struck Dubai — Dubai Creek Harbour tower damaged, Dubai International Airport hit. UAE directly struck. (2) Bahrain intercepted 114 missiles + 190 drones since Feb 28. (3) Saudi Arabia intercepted 38 drones over eastern region. (4) 2 killed in Oman by drones (confirmed). (5) Iran death toll now 1,444 dead, 18,551 injured. (6) US deploying 2,200 Marines from Okinawa. (7) KC-135 crashed in Iraq, 6 crew killed (non-combat). (8) CNN: Trump admin had NO plan for Hormuz closure — 'dumbfounded' former officials. (9) 250+ US orgs letter to Congress: $11.3bn spent. (10) Tehran rally strike hit near senior officials (Larijani, Pezeshkian, Araghchi). (11) Australia ordering evacuations from UAE/Israel. (12) Qatar airspace closed, 140+ repatriation flights. War now hitting Dubai, Oman, Bahrain, Saudi — far beyond Iran/Hormuz. 73→78.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 00:00 — IMMINENT RISING. Major escalations: (1) Israel destroys Zrarieh Bridge over Litani River — first承认 striking civilian infrastructure. (2) Katz threatens 'Gaza-scale devastation' — leaflets dropped over Beirut warning same destruction. (3) 773 killed in Lebanon (up from 680), 1,933 wounded, 98 children dead. (4) Strikes hit NEW Beirut neighborhoods: Bourj Hammoud, Jnah, Nabaa — previously untouched areas. (5) 9 killed in Arki near Sidon incl. 5 children. (6) Ambulance struck in south. (7) CNN: Israel 'seizing moment to finish Hezbollah' — comprehensive campaign. (8) Reuters: Israel 'signals long campaign.' Infrastructure destruction signal added — first formal acknowledgment. Gaza-scale threat now explicit from Defense Minister. 78→82.

turkey.notes: CRITICAL — RISING. Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkey (Mar 13). New detail: india.com reports Iran 'carried out major attack in vicinity of US nuclear base' — Incirlik houses US B61 nuclear weapons. Adana sirens 3:25am. Spain's Patriot crews at Incirlik detected first missile (Mar 4). Turkey demanding Tehran clarify — 'running between Tehran and Washington to no avail' (Washington Times). Atlantic Council: 'Iran attacking critical energy infrastructure.' Pattern now: 3 intercepts in 10 days (Mar 4, 9, 13), each closer to Incirlik. Article 4 pressure mounting. 34→36.

india.notes: Stable deterrent. No new signals. India monitoring Hormuz for shipping impacts. India-Canada nuclear cooperation — Pakistan criticism ongoing. No escalation indicators.

russia.notes: UK Defence Secretary Healey publicly linking Iran to Russia — 'laying ground for hard choices.' Guardian: Russia providing piloting tips to Iran (denied by Putin to Trump). Russia continuing arms supply while calling for ceasefire. Putin wants Trump's help on Ukraine. Stable deterrent — no new escalation signals.

china.notes: NOTABLE: 13 consecutive days of near-zero PLA flights near Taiwan — broken Mar 13 with 5 aircraft near median line. ISW: reduction tied to Two Sessions + Trump-Xi summit prep (Mar 31-Apr 2) + possibly resource diversion to ME posture. NYT: US military commanders worried about 'shrinking stockpiles' affecting Asia posture. $14B Taiwan arms deal awaiting Trump approval. Chinese fishing boats in 'unusual formations' in East China Sea (Telugu13). Flights dropping but tactical repositioning possible. Stable deterrent — monitoring fishing boat movement.

north_korea.notes: OFAC sanctioned DPRK IT networks for crypto-enabled sanctions evasion. No military provocations. China-DPRK engagement increasing. Iran-DPRK cooperation revival 'highly likely.' Stable elevated.

russia_ukraine.notes: RISING. Zelensky: US sought postponement of trilateral talks on Ukraine settlement. ISW: continued Russian offensive, Ukrainian counter-attacks exploiting dispersed Russian positions. Russia ~1.28M total casualties, 860 KIA/WIA in past 24h. Russia occupies ~20% of Ukraine. Trump deal stalling while US consumed by Iran war. 26→27.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: No new reports in this cycle. Saudi-Pakistan Strategic Mutual Defence Agreement active. China mediating. Previous: Pakistan bombed Kandahar airport fuel depot. Border fighting at Spin Boldak/Mohmand. Stable elevated — awaiting next cycle update.

top_signals: Iranian drones STRUCK DUBAI — Dubai Creek Harbour tower damaged, Dubai International Airport hit. UAE directly in crosshairs. (Al Jazeera/EPA)
Lebanon death toll surges to 773, Israel destroys Litani River bridge, Katz threatens 'Gaza-scale devastation' with leaflets over Beirut (Al Jazeera/Reuters)
Bahrain intercepted 114 missiles + 190 drones; Saudi intercepted 38 drones; 2 killed in Oman — Gulf-wide retaliation in full swing (Al Jazeera)
Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO over Turkey near Incirlik nuclear base in 10 days — 3:25am sirens in Adana (NYT/Reuters/France24)
US deploys 2,200 Marines from Okinawa; 250+ US organizations demand Congress halt $11.3bn war spending (AJ/NBC)
Iran death toll: 1,444 dead, 18,551 injured — new Supreme Leader 'wounded, likely disfigured' per Hegseth
CNN: Trump admin had NO contingency plan for Hormuz closure — 'bedrock principle of US security policy for decades' ignored
KC-135 refueling tanker crashes in Iraq, 6 crew killed — operational strain showing

new: iran_conventional: dubai_struck — Iranian drones hit Dubai Creek Harbour tower and Dubai International Airport. UAE directly struck. Major escalation — Gulf state civilian infrastructure targeted.
iran_conventional: marine_expeditionary_deploy — US deploying 2,200 Marines from Okinawa to ME for operations and evacuations. Force posture escalation.
israel_lebanon: infrastructure_destruction — Israel destroys Zrarieh Bridge over Litani. First承认 striking civilian infrastructure. Katz threatens 'increasing costs through damage to infrastructure.'
turkey: incirlik_targeted — Iran missile targeted vicinity of US nuclear base at Incirlik. B61 nuclear weapons stored there. Major escalation of NATO entanglement.
russia_ukraine: trump_deal_stalling — US postponed trilateral Ukraine talks. Trump consumed by Iran war, Ukraine deal stalling.
zone_changes: iran_nuke: elevated(13) → deterrent(10) — FALLING. New SL focused on conventional, no nuclear signals.
turkey: critical(34) → critical(36) — RISING. Third intercept, Incirlik nuclear base now explicitly in play.
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: NUCLEAR TRACK: Continued de-escalation — Mojtaba Khamenei's first statement is entirely conventional (Hormuz blockade demand). 460kg of 60% uranium remains latent capability but no enrichment escalation, no test signals. Scientists killed + Isfahan buried degrades operational pathway. Now in DETERRENT zone (10%). CONVENTIONAL: MASSIVE escalation cycle. Iranian war now hitting Dubai, Oman, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia — Gulf-wide. 1,444 dead in Iran. 773 dead in Lebanon. 16+ ships attacked. Qatar airspace closed. Australia evacuating citizens. US deploying Marines from Pacific (Okinawa). Key risk: resource diversion from Asia emboldens China timing. 3rd missile intercept over Incirlik — US nuclear weapons base — escalates NATO entanglement to new level. KEY WATCH FOR NEXT 12H: whether Turkey invokes Article 4 after 4th intercept; whether Dubai strikes trigger UAE military response; whether shipping insurance collapse accelerates energy crisis; whether Israel opens full ground incursion in Lebanon after bridge destruction + evacuation orders; whether US Congress moves on war funding after 250+ org letter.

latest_news.headline: Iranian drones STRIKE DUBAI — Creek Harbour tower damaged, airport hit
latest_news.text: Iranian drones struck Dubai — Dubai Creek Harbour tower damaged, Dubai International Airport hit. UAE directly struck for the first time. Major escalation beyond Hormuz/Gulf shipping.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridge in Lebanon, threatens 'Gaza-scale devastation' with leaflets over Beirut
latest_news.text: Israel destroyed Zrarieh Bridge over Litani River — first承认 civilian infrastructure strike. Katz threatened 'increasing costs through damage to infrastructure and loss of territory.' Leaflets over Beirut warn of Gaza-scale destruction. 773 now killed in Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: Bahrain intercepted 114 missiles and 190 drones since war began; Saudi intercepted 38 drones
latest_news.text: Gulf states absorbing massive Iranian retaliation. Bahrain: 114 missiles + 190 drones intercepted. Saudi Arabia: 38 drones intercepted over eastern region. Two killed in Oman by drones. Iran war now Gulf-wide.

latest_news.headline: Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted near US nuclear base Incirlik in Turkey — 3 in 10 days
latest_news.text: NATO air defences shot down third Iranian ballistic missile over Turkey. New detail: missile targeted vicinity of Incirlik Air Base which houses US B61 nuclear weapons. Adana sirens 3:25am. Turkey demands Tehran clarify. Spain's Patriot crews detected first missile.

latest_news.headline: US deploys 2,200 Marines from Okinawa to Middle East
latest_news.text: US deploying Marine expeditionary unit (~2,200 personnel) from Okinawa, Japan to Middle East for operations and potential evacuations. Force posture escalation — drawing down Pacific assets.

latest_news.headline: CNN: Trump administration had NO plan for Iran closing Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: Senior Trump officials told lawmakers in classified briefings they did not plan for Hormuz closure. Former officials 'dumbfounded' — preventing this was 'bedrock principle of US national security policy for decades.'

latest_news.headline: Iran death toll: 1,444 dead, 18,551 injured; new Supreme Leader 'wounded, likely disfigured'
latest_news.text: Iran Health Ministry: 1,444 killed, 18,551 injured in US-Israel attacks since Feb 28. Ages 8 months to 88. Hegseth says Mojtaba Khamenei 'wounded and likely disfigured.' Trump calls killed leaders 'deranged scumbags.'

latest_news.headline: US KC-135 refueling tanker crashes in Iraq, all 6 crew killed
latest_news.text: US Air Force KC-135 Stratotanker crashed in western Iraq. All 6 crew killed. CENTCOM says not due to hostile or friendly fire — mid-air collision with another aircraft reported. Operational strain from sustained ME operations.

outlook: IMMINENT — Global war probability RISING to 44%. Iran conventional (78) and Israel-Lebanon (82) both deep in IMMINENT zone. Tonight's critical developments: (1) IRAN WAR GOES GULF-WIDE: Iranian drones struck Dubai directly — airport and residential tower hit. Bahrain absorbed 304+ Iranian projectiles (114 missiles + 190 drones). Saudi intercepted 38 drones. 2 killed in Oman. This is no longer a Hormuz-centric conflict — it's a Gulf-wide war. (2) LEBANON TURNS GAZA: Israel destroyed Litani River bridge, explicitly targeting civilian infrastructure for first time. Katz threatens 'Gaza-scale devastation.' Leaflets dropped over Beirut. Death toll surged from 680 to 773 in 24h. New Beirut neighborhoods struck. (3) US STRAIN VISIBLE: 2,200 Marines redeployed from Pacific (Okinawa) to ME. KC-135 crashed in Iraq (6 dead). CNN reveals no Hormuz contingency existed. 250+ orgs demand war funding halt. $11.3bn spent. (4) INCIRLIK NUCLEAR BASE IN PLAY: Third missile intercept over Turkey near US B61 nuclear weapons storage. NATO entanglement now explicitly threatens nuclear assets. KEY WATCH FOR NEXT 12H: Article 4 pressure on Turkey after 4th intercept; Dubai/UAE military response to strikes; ground incursion in Lebanon after bridge destruction; shipping insurance collapse; Congressional war funding debate; Pacific force posture gaps as Marines redeploy to ME.
